title: Settings
deleteAccountConfirmMessage: This action cannot be undone. All your data (food diary, weight, exercise, conversations, etc.) will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccountError: Failed to delete account, please try again later

goalsPage.goalsSaveFailed: Failed to save, please try again later

notificationsPage.stopAfterGoalDesc: Stop reminders when daily water goal is reached
notificationsPage.reminderNote: Reminders will send browser notifications at the set interval during the specified period. Keep the browser tab open.
notificationsPage.enableNotification: Please allow browser notifications to enable reminders
notificationsPage.milestoneNote: Check water progress at set times and send a reminder if behind.
notificationsPage.milestoneBehind: {{time}} target {{target}} mL, currently {{current}} mL, {{deficit}} mL behind
notificationsPage.validationTimeOrder: Times must be in chronological order

subscriptionPage.canceledNote: Subscription canceled. Pro features will stop after the expiration date.
subscriptionPage.successMessage: Subscription successful! Pro features are now active.
subscriptionPage.canceledMessage: Checkout was canceled. Contact us if you have any questions.

exportPage.description: Select items to export. Data will be downloaded in CSV format.
exportPage.exportFailed: The following items failed to export: {{items}}

referralPage.pleaseLogin: Please sign in to view your referral code.
referralPage.referralSuccess: Referral code applied! You get 14 days Pro trial, referrer gets 30 days free.
referralPage.alreadyReferred: You have already joined via a referral code.
referralPage.noReferrals: No referrals yet, share your referral code with friends!
referralPage.shareText: Check out Open Health — track diet, exercise, sleep, weight all in one place! Sign up with my referral link and get 14 days Pro trial for free 🎉
referralPage.customFailedRetry: Customization failed, please try again later
referralPage.applyFailedRetry: Application failed, please try again later

rewardsPage.title: Revenue Share
rewardsPage.pleaseLogin: Please sign in to view revenue share.
rewardsPage.withdrawNote: Revenue is confirmed 90 days after payment. Minimum withdrawal is $5. Currently only subscription credit is supported.
rewardsPage.withdrawSubmitted: Withdrawal request submitted, will be credited to next subscription.
rewardsPage.noRewards: No reward records yet. Refer friends who subscribe to earn 25% revenue share.
